visual_description: A man with short dark hair and a dark leather jacket sits at a table, holding chopsticks with a green leafy vegetable. He brings the chopsticks to his mouth and takes a bite as steam rises from a nearby container. The background is dimly lit and out of focus, showing blurred lights and possibly a street setting.
